metadata.seed: I feel calm most of the time, but sometimes when small things pile up it feels like nothing is going the way it should, and I end up blowing up.

patient.query: I feel calm most of the time, but sometimes when small things pile up it feels like nothing is going the way it should, and I end up blowing up.

automatic_thoughts: nothing is going the way it should

llm_response.response: It sounds like you're dealing with a lot of pressure building up from small things, even though you usually feel calm. It's understandable to feel overwhelmed at times when we have too much on our plate. Let's explore together if there are any thoughts or beliefs that might be contributing to this feeling.

patient.query: I guess I just feel really overwhelmed lately. It's like there's this weight on my chest, and I can't shake it off. I keep thinking about how I keep disappointing myself and others, and it just makes everything feel even heavier.

automatic_thoughts: I keep disappointing myself and others

llm_response.response: I'm really sorry to hear that you've been feeling overwhelmed lately. It sounds like there might be a lot on your plate right now, and it can feel heavy when we carry those feelings with us. Let's explore together if there are any specific situations or events that might be contributing to this sense of disappointment in yourself and others.

patient.query: Yeah, that would make sense. I mean, I’ve had a lot going on with work and family lately. Sometimes I feel like I’m not doing enough, and then I see others around me managing things so effortlessly. It just makes me question why I can’t keep it all together.

automatic_thoughts: I can’t keep it all together

llm_response.response: It sounds like you're dealing with a lot right now, and it can be overwhelming. It's important to remember that everyone has their own challenges, and it's okay not to meet unrealistic expectations. Let's work together to find ways to manage your time more effectively and reduce some of the pressure you're feeling.

patient.query: I know I should be more forgiving of myself, but it’s hard. I keep thinking that if I don't push myself, I'll just fall behind. I guess I just worry that if I ease up, everything will fall apart. And that really scares me.

automatic_thoughts: if I don't push myself, I'll just fall behind
if I ease up, everything will fall apart

neutral: Fear of being a burden to others (finding)

llm_response.response: It sounds like you're dealing with a lot right now. You mentioned feeling anxious about making mistakes and fearing that if you ease up, everything will fall apart. It's understandable to feel this way, but it's important to remember that everyone makes mistakes and taking breaks can actually help prevent burnout. Let's explore some ways we can work on reducing these feelings of anxiety and self-pressure.

retrieved_concepts_used.concept: Fear of being a burden to others
retrieved_concepts_used.label: neutral
